title: Kumru LLM

title: Smart Auto-Scaling for Amazon EKS: Meet Karpenter
author: Seçil Nur Sucu
summary: If you're running workloads on Kubernetes, you've probably faced the constant balancing act between over-provisioning (wasting money) and under-provisioning (hurting performance). This is where Karpenter comes in — an intelligent, high-performance autoscaler purpose-built for Kubernetes. What is Karpenter? Karpenter is an open-source autoscaler supported by Amazon Web Services (AWS). While it's optimized for Amazon EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service), it's also…

title: Revealing Cloud Magic: Pulumi and the Art of Infrastructure Orchestration
author: Seçil Nur Sucu
summary: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) is a software engineering approach that involves managing and provisioning computing infrastructure through machine-readable script files or configuration files. Instead of manually setting up servers, networks, and other infrastructure components, IaC allows developers and operations teams to define and automate the provisioning of infrastructure using code.
